certifying_bodies.name: IFANCA
aliases: Islamic Food and Nutrition Council of America

certifying_bodies.name: ESMA
aliases: Emirates Authority for Standardization and Metrology

rules.title: E120 Carmine
rules.reason: Carmine and cochineal are insect-derived colorants and are treated as non-compliant by the maintained halal rule base.

rules.title: E441 Gelatin
rules.reason: Gelatin is source-dependent and requires halal-certified fish, bovine, or plant source documentation.

rules.title: Pork Gelatin
rules.reason: Pork-derived gelatin is explicitly non-compliant.

rules.title: E471 Mono and Diglycerides
rules.reason: Mono and diglycerides may come from plant or animal fat and require source verification.

rules.title: E472 Ester Emulsifiers
rules.reason: E472 emulsifiers can be made from animal-derived fatty acids.

rules.title: E473 Sucrose Esters
rules.reason: Sucrose esters can involve fatty acids of uncertain origin.

rules.title: E474 Sucroglycerides
rules.reason: Sucroglycerides may involve animal-derived glycerides.

rules.title: E475 Polyglycerol Esters
rules.reason: Polyglycerol esters can use fatty acids of uncertain animal or plant source.

rules.title: E476 PGPR
rules.reason: PGPR is treated as doubtful until the fatty-acid source is verified.

rules.title: E477 Propylene Glycol Esters
rules.reason: The fatty-acid source must be verified before compliance can be confirmed.

rules.title: E481 Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate
rules.reason: Stearoyl lactylates may be derived from animal fat and require source verification.

rules.title: E482 Calcium Stearoyl Lactylate
rules.reason: Stearoyl lactylates may be derived from animal fat and require source verification.

rules.title: E483 Stearyl Tartrate
rules.reason: Stearyl tartrate depends on the source of stearyl alcohol.

rules.title: E542 Bone Phosphate
rules.reason: Bone phosphate is animal-bone derived and is non-compliant without halal-certified animal source evidence.

rules.title: E570 Stearic Acid
rules.reason: Stearic acid can be plant or animal derived and requires source verification.

rules.title: E904 Shellac
rules.reason: Shellac is an insect secretion and is treated as non-compliant in this rule base.

rules.title: E920 L-Cysteine
rules.reason: L-cysteine can be sourced from human hair or pig bristles and is blocked unless explicitly microbial or synthetic.

rules.title: E422 Glycerol
rules.reason: Glycerol may be synthetic, plant-derived, or animal-derived and needs source verification.

rules.title: E153 Carbon Black
rules.reason: Carbon black source and processing aid status should be verified.

rules.title: E470 Fatty Acid Salts
rules.reason: Fatty acid salts can be animal or plant derived.

rules.title: Sorbitan Esters
rules.reason: Sorbitan esters can involve fatty acids of uncertain source.

rules.title: Pork Meat
rules.reason: Pork and swine-derived meat are explicitly non-compliant.

rules.title: Pork Fat
rules.reason: Pork fat and lard are explicitly non-compliant.

rules.title: Cured Pork Products
rules.reason: Cured pork products are non-compliant.

rules.title: Pork Stock and Flavor
rules.reason: Pork stock, broth, extract, and flavoring are non-compliant.

rules.title: Blood Products
rules.reason: Flowing blood and blood-derived food ingredients are non-compliant.

rules.title: Animal Fat
rules.reason: Animal fat is source- and slaughter-dependent and requires halal certification.

rules.title: Animal Enzymes
rules.reason: Unspecified enzymes can be animal-derived and require source verification.

rules.title: Rennet
rules.reason: Rennet is halal only if microbial, plant-based, or from halal-slaughtered animals.

rules.title: Microbial Rennet
rules.reason: Microbial, vegetarian, and plant-based rennet are treated as compliant.

rules.title: Pepsin
rules.reason: Pepsin is commonly animal-derived and requires halal-certified source evidence.

rules.title: Lipase
rules.reason: Lipase may be animal, plant, or microbial and requires source verification.

rules.title: Trypsin
rules.reason: Trypsin may be animal-derived and requires source verification.

rules.title: Alcoholic Beverages
rules.reason: Alcoholic beverages and intoxicants used as ingredients are non-compliant.

rules.title: Ethanol and Alcohol
rules.reason: Added intoxicating alcohol is non-compliant.

rules.title: Alcohol-Based Flavor Extract
rules.reason: Flavor extracts may use alcohol as a solvent and require residual alcohol and source verification.

rules.title: Natural Flavors
rules.reason: Natural flavors can include animal-derived or alcohol-based carriers and require source verification.

rules.title: Artificial Flavors
rules.reason: Artificial flavors can use doubtful carriers and should be verified when source is unspecified.

rules.title: Whey
rules.reason: Whey depends on rennet and cheese-processing source.

rules.title: Cheese Cultures and Enzymes
rules.reason: Cheese products require verification of rennet and enzyme sources.

rules.title: Uncertified Meat
rules.reason: Land animal meat requires halal slaughter and certification evidence.

rules.title: Zabiha Certified Meat
rules.reason: Halal-certified slaughter evidence resolves the meat-source requirement.

rules.title: Fish
rules.reason: Fish is treated as compliant by the maintained default rule base.

rules.title: Shellfish School Difference
rules.reason: Some seafood categories may differ by school of law and are routed to review.

rules.title: Plant Oils
rules.reason: Plant oils are treated as compliant unless contaminated or mixed with animal-derived material.

rules.title: Grains and Starches
rules.reason: Plant-derived grains and starches are treated as compliant.

rules.title: Water, Sugars and Salts
rules.reason: Water, basic sugars, and salts are treated as compliant.

rules.title: E300 Ascorbic Acid
rules.reason: Ascorbic acid is treated as compliant.

rules.title: E330 Citric Acid
rules.reason: Citric acid is treated as compliant.

rules.title: E406 Agar
rules.reason: Agar is seaweed-derived and treated as compliant.

rules.title: E412 Guar Gum
rules.reason: Guar gum is plant-derived and treated as compliant.

rules.title: E415 Xanthan Gum
rules.reason: Xanthan gum is microbial fermentation-derived and treated as compliant.

rules.title: E440 Pectin
rules.reason: Pectin is plant-derived and treated as compliant.

rules.title: Cross Contamination
rules.reason: Possible contact with haram material requires review unless cleaning controls are documented.

rules.title: Non-Halal Facility
rules.reason: Facility status is unresolved and requires verification.

rules.title: Halal Certified Label
rules.reason: A halal-certified label supports compliance only when the certifying body is recognized.

rules.title: Collagen
rules.reason: Collagen source must be verified because it is often animal-derived.

rules.title: Magnesium Stearate
rules.reason: Magnesium stearate can be plant or animal derived and needs source verification.

rules.title: Calcium Stearate
rules.reason: Calcium stearate can be plant or animal derived and needs source verification.

rules.title: Capsule Gelatin
rules.reason: Capsule gelatin is source-dependent and requires halal certification.
